dependencies.relationship: requires server_foundation auth middleware, workspaces and workspace_tokens table schema
requires user identity and API key authentication from oauth_and_users

task_groups.title: Write test scaffolding and workspace validation tests

subtasks.title: Set up integration test helpers and database fixtures for spec 04
details: Create test package under internal/integration/ (or equivalent) for spec 04
Implement helpers to spin up an in-memory SQLite database with workspaces, workspace_tokens, teams, and users tables from spec 01 schema
Implement test fixture factories: createUser(), createAPIKey(), createAdminToken(), createWorkspace(), createWorkspaceToken()
Implement HTTP test client wrapper around Echo's httptest support with helper methods for GET, POST, DELETE with Authorization header injection
Implement assertion helpers: assertWorkspaceSchema(t, body), assertErrorEnvelope(t, body, code), isISO8601(s string) bool, isBase62(s string) bool

subtasks.title: Write tests for workspace slug validation (REQ-1)
details: TS-04-1: POST with valid slug 'my-workspace-123' returns 201 with all eight fields
TS-04-2: POST with slug containing uppercase/special chars returns 400 with error envelope
TS-04-3: POST with duplicate slug returns 409 with error envelope
TS-04-E1: POST with 2-char slug returns 400; POST with 65-char slug returns 400; 3-char and 64-char boundary slugs succeed
TS-04-E2: POST with trailing-hyphen slug 'my-workspace-' returns 400
TS-04-E3: POST with digit-starting slug '1workspace' and hyphen-starting slug '-workspace' both return 400

subtasks.title: Write tests for git_url and branch validation (REQ-2, REQ-3)
details: TS-04-4: POST with https:// git_url returns 201, git_url stored verbatim
TS-04-5: POST with SCP-style git@github.com:org/repo.git returns 201, stored verbatim
TS-04-6: POST with ssh://, git://, http://, ftp:// schemes all return 400
TS-04-7: POST with git_url > 2048 chars returns 400
TS-04-E4: POST with git_url exactly 2049 chars returns 400
TS-04-E5: POST with git_url exactly 2048 chars (https://) returns 201
TS-04-8: POST with branch omitted or null returns 201 with branch=null
TS-04-9: POST with branch='feature/my-branch' (<=255 chars, no whitespace) returns 201
TS-04-10: POST with branch of 256 chars returns 400
TS-04-11: POST with branch containing space, tab, newline, CR each returns 400
TS-04-E6: POST with branch='' documents implementation behavior (201 or 400, stored behavior asserted)

subtasks.title: Write tests for team_id validation and workspace creation endpoint (REQ-4, REQ-5)
details: TS-04-12: POST with team_id omitted or null stores null team_id
TS-04-13: POST with valid active team_id stores team_id and returns 201
TS-04-14: POST with nonexistent team_id returns 400; POST with inactive team_id returns 400
TS-04-15: Valid POST returns 201 with all eight schema fields; owner_user_id matches auth user; updated_at == created_at
TS-04-16: POST with admin token returns 403
TS-04-17: POST with workspace token returns 403
TS-04-E7: POST when DB INSERT fails returns 500 with no partial record (use mock/stub DB layer)
TS-04-55: POST with extra unknown fields in body returns 201 (extra fields silently ignored)
TS-04-56: POST with no Content-Type header but valid JSON body returns 201

subtasks.title: Write tests for list workspaces and get workspace endpoints (REQ-6, REQ-7, REQ-8)
details: TS-04-18: User API key lists only own workspaces ordered by created_at ASC, id ASC
TS-04-19: Admin token lists all workspaces ordered by created_at ASC, id ASC
TS-04-20: Workspace token on GET /api/v1/workspaces returns 403
TS-04-21: User with no workspaces receives empty array []
TS-04-22: Owner or admin GET /:slug returns 200 with all eight fields
TS-04-23: Valid scoped workspace token GET /:slug returns 200 with all eight fields (no redaction)
TS-04-24: Non-existent slug returns 404 for any caller type
TS-04-25: Non-owner user GET /:slug (existing workspace) returns 403
TS-04-26: Workspace token scoped to different workspace returns 403 on GET /:slug
TS-04-27: Workspace object has exactly the eight defined fields with correct types
TS-04-28: All three caller types receive identical workspace object shape
TS-04-29: POST returns 201 with updated_at == created_at
TS-04-E11: Non-owner user queries non-existent slug returns 404 (not 403)

subtasks.title: Write tests for token creation endpoint (REQ-9, REQ-12)
details: TS-04-30: Valid token creation returns 201 with token (af_wt_ prefix), token_id (8 base62 chars), label, expires_at, created_at
TS-04-31: Plaintext token in response; SHA-256 hash of secret stored in DB (not plaintext)
TS-04-32: Omitted expires defaults to 30 days; expires=0 produces null expires_at
TS-04-33: Invalid expires values (1, 29, 31, 45, 91, -1) each return 400
TS-04-34: Empty string label normalized to null; omitted label is null; non-empty label stored as-is
TS-04-35: Label exceeding 128 chars returns 400
TS-04-36: Non-owner user API key returns 403; workspace token returns 403
TS-04-37: Non-existent slug returns 404
TS-04-49: Token matches regex ^af_wt_[0-9A-Za-z]{8}_[0-9A-Za-z]{32}$
TS-04-50: DB row secret_hash equals sha256(plaintext_secret); no column contains raw secret
TS-04-E8: All 3 token_id collision retries fail → 500, no partial record; attempt counter == 3
TS-04-E9: Non-collision DB INSERT error → 500, no new record
TS-04-E10: Unbounded token creation allowed; duplicate labels accepted
TS-04-E13: crypto/rand error → 500, no record, no panic

subtasks.title: Verify test scaffolding compiles and all test stubs are in place

checks: go test ./internal/integration/... -count=1 -run TestSpec04 compiles without error (tests may be skipped pending implementation)
go vet ./... reports no issues in test files
All test functions from TS-04-1 through TS-04-56, TS-04-E1 through TS-04-E13 have corresponding Go test function stubs
Test helper factories (createUser, createAPIKey, createWorkspace, createWorkspaceToken) compile and return correct types
assertWorkspaceSchema and assertErrorEnvelope helpers compile and are referenced by at least one test

task_groups.title: Write tests for token listing, revocation, auth middleware, property, and smoke tests

subtasks.title: Write tests for list tokens and revoke token endpoints (REQ-10, REQ-11)
details: TS-04-38: GET .../tokens returns all tokens (active, expired, revoked) ordered by created_at ASC, id ASC; each object has token_id, label, created_at, expires_at, revoked_at; no secret field
TS-04-39: Workspace token on GET .../tokens returns 403
TS-04-40: Non-existent slug on GET .../tokens returns 404
TS-04-41: Non-owner user on GET .../tokens returns 403
TS-04-42: Workspace with no tokens returns empty array []
TS-04-43: DELETE valid token returns 204 with empty body; DB row has non-null revoked_at
TS-04-44: DELETE already-revoked token returns 204 (idempotent)
TS-04-45: DELETE with non-existent token_id returns 404
TS-04-46: DELETE with token_id belonging to different workspace returns 404 (information hiding)
TS-04-47: Non-owner user and workspace token caller return 403 on DELETE
TS-04-48: DELETE with non-existent slug returns 404
TS-04-E12: DB UPDATE error during revocation returns 500; revoked_at remains null

subtasks.title: Write tests for auth middleware workspace token validation (REQ-12, REQ-13)
details: TS-04-51: Expired workspace token returns 401 before handler runs; revoked workspace token returns 401
TS-04-52: Workspace token belonging to blocked user returns 401
TS-04-53: Full access control matrix verified — admin 403 on POST /workspaces; workspace token 403 on list; workspace token 200 on own GET/:slug; workspace token 403 on token endpoints
TS-04-54: Workspace_id from context mismatches resolved workspace → 403 confirmed

subtasks.title: Write property-based tests (TS-04-P1 through TS-04-P9)
details: TS-04-P1: Generate N random valid slugs including duplicates; assert no two DB rows share same slug; duplicate attempts return 409
TS-04-P2: For all created tokens, assert no workspace_tokens column equals plaintext secret; secret_hash == hex(sha256(secret))
TS-04-P3: For any created token, call GET .../tokens; assert no object has 'token' field or raw secret substring
TS-04-P4: For expired/revoked tokens, assert 401 across all six endpoint routes
TS-04-P5: For any workspace token T scoped to W1 used on W2's slug, assert 403
TS-04-P6: For any workspace creation, assert response.body.updated_at == response.body.created_at; verified in DB too
TS-04-P7: Mock crypto/rand to always collide; assert retry_counter <= 3; all 3 fail → 500; first non-collision → 201
TS-04-P8: DELETE token twice (active then already-revoked); both return 204; revoked_at unchanged on second call
TS-04-P9: List responses ordered by created_at ASC, id ASC; verified with identical-timestamp fixtures

subtasks.title: Write smoke tests (TS-04-SMOKE-1 through TS-04-SMOKE-5)
details: TS-04-SMOKE-1: End-to-end workspace creation via user API key — auth middleware → handler → DB insert → HTTP 201 with all eight fields; updated_at == created_at; DB record exists
TS-04-SMOKE-2: Token creation flow — crypto/rand → base62 → SHA-256 → DB insert → HTTP 201; token regex verified; SHA-256 hash in DB; expires_at computed correctly
TS-04-SMOKE-3: Delegated workspace access via workspace token — middleware validates token, attaches workspace_id, handler checks scope → 200; mismatched slug → 403; expired/revoked → 401
TS-04-SMOKE-4: Token revocation flow — 204 on first call; 204 on second (idempotent); DB has revoked_at; cross-workspace token_id → 404; non-existent slug → 404; non-owner → 403
TS-04-SMOKE-5: Admin lists all workspaces → 200 with all records ordered correctly; workspace token on same endpoint → 403; empty DB → empty array

subtasks.title: Verify all test files for group 2 compile and are registered

checks: go test ./internal/integration/... -count=1 -run TestSpec04 compiles without error for all test group 2 files
go vet ./... reports no issues
TS-04-38 through TS-04-54, TS-04-P1 through TS-04-P9, and TS-04-SMOKE-1 through TS-04-SMOKE-5 all have corresponding Go test function stubs present
Property test helpers (mock crypto/rand injection interface, DB query helpers for secret_hash verification) compile correctly
Smoke test setup (real Echo server with routes, real SQLite DB) compiles and can spin up without panic

task_groups.title: Implement workspace validation logic and data models

subtasks.title: Define workspace and token request/response structs
details: Define CreateWorkspaceRequest struct with fields: Slug string, GitURL string, Branch *string, TeamID *string using json tags
Define Workspace struct (response) with all eight fields: ID, Slug, GitURL, Branch, TeamID, OwnerUserID, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt using json tags matching schema
Define CreateTokenRequest struct with fields: Label *string, Expires *int using json tags
Define TokenCreateResponse struct with fields: Token, TokenID, Label, ExpiresAt, CreatedAt
Define TokenListItem struct with fields: TokenID, Label, CreatedAt, ExpiresAt, RevokedAt (no secret)
Place structs in an appropriate package (e.g. internal/workspace/)

subtasks.title: Implement slug validation function
details: Implement validateSlug(slug string) error returning nil for valid slugs, descriptive error otherwise
Enforce: 3-64 characters, starts with lowercase letter [a-z], contains only [a-z0-9-], does not end with hyphen
Use regexp.MustCompile for the pattern; compile once at package init
Return specific error messages distinguishing each rule failure (length, character set, start, trailing hyphen)
Write unit tests covering boundary lengths (2, 3, 64, 65) and all rule violations

subtasks.title: Implement git_url and branch validation functions
details: Implement validateGitURL(url string) error: accept strings starting with 'https://' OR matching ^git@[^:]+:.+$; reject all other schemes; enforce max 2048 chars

Implement validateBranch(branch *string) error: nil/null pointer returns nil; non-nil checks max 255 chars and no ASCII whitespace (0x20, 0x09, 0x0A, 0x0D); document empty string behavior explicitly (store as-is, since no rule rejects it)
Write unit tests for HTTPS boundary (2048 chars pass, 2049 fail), SCP pattern, rejected schemes (ssh://, git://, http://, ftp://), branch whitespace variants, branch length boundary

subtasks.title: Implement workspace token generation and secret hashing
details: Implement generateBase62(n int) (string, error) using crypto/rand.Read; consume sufficient bytes; map to base62 alphabet 0-9A-Za-z; propagate rand errors as Go error (no panic, no os.Exit)
Implement generateTokenID() (string, error) calling generateBase62(8)
Implement generateSecret() (string, error) calling generateBase62(32)
Implement hashSecret(secret string) string using crypto/sha256.Sum256; return hex-encoded hash
Implement assembleToken(tokenID, secret string) string returning 'af_wt_<tokenID>_<secret>'
Write unit tests: token matches ^af_wt_[0-9A-Za-z]{8}_[0-9A-Za-z]{32}$; hashSecret output equals expected SHA-256 hex; generateBase62 with mocked rand error returns error

subtasks.title: Implement token label and expires validation functions
details: Implement normalizeLabel(label *string) *string: nil → nil; empty string → nil; non-empty → pointer to trimmed string if <=128 chars; return error if >128 chars
Implement validateExpires(expires *int) (int, error): nil → default 30; value must be one of {0, 30, 60, 90}; return error with descriptive message for any other value
Implement computeExpiresAt(createdAt time.Time, days int) *time.Time: 0 → nil; non-zero → pointer to createdAt.Add(days * 24 * time.Hour)
Write unit tests for each: label empty string → nil, label 128 chars pass, label 129 chars error; expires nil → 30, valid set passes, invalid value errors

subtasks.title: Verify validation logic unit tests pass

checks: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 passes with all validation unit tests green
go vet ./internal/workspace/... reports no issues
validateSlug covers all boundary and rule-violation cases from 04-REQ-1.1 through 04-REQ-1.E3
validateGitURL covers HTTPS and SCP-style acceptance plus all rejected schemes and length boundary from 04-REQ-2.1 through 04-REQ-2.E2
validateBranch covers null, valid, too-long, and whitespace cases from 04-REQ-3.1 through 04-REQ-3.E1
generateBase62 / hashSecret / assembleToken unit tests pass and regex ^af_wt_[0-9A-Za-z]{8}_[0-9A-Za-z]{32}$ is validated
normalizeLabel and validateExpires unit tests pass with all boundary values

task_groups.title: Implement database layer for workspaces and workspace tokens

subtasks.title: Implement workspace repository: insert and get-by-slug
details: Implement InsertWorkspace(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, w Workspace) (Workspace, error): execute INSERT INTO workspaces with all eight fields; set updated_at = created_at in the INSERT statement; detect UNIQUE constraint violation and return a sentinel ErrSlugConflict error; propagate other DB errors as-is
Implement GetWorkspaceBySlug(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, slug string) (Workspace, error): SELECT all eight columns WHERE slug = ?; return ErrNotFound sentinel if no rows
Implement ValidateTeamExists(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, teamID string) error: SELECT id FROM teams WHERE id = ? AND active = true; return ErrTeamNotFound if no rows
Write unit tests using in-memory SQLite: insert + retrieve roundtrip; duplicate slug → ErrSlugConflict; missing slug → ErrNotFound; inactive team → ErrTeamNotFound

subtasks.title: Implement workspace repository: list workspaces
details: Implement ListWorkspaces(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, ownerUserID *string) ([]Workspace, error): if ownerUserID is nil (admin), query all rows; if non-nil, filter WHERE owner_user_id = ?; ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC; return empty slice (not nil) when no results
Write unit tests: user sees only own workspaces; admin sees all; empty result returns []; ordering with same created_at verified by id ASC

subtasks.title: Implement workspace token repository: insert, list, and revoke
details: Implement InsertWorkspaceToken(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, t WorkspaceToken) (WorkspaceToken, error): INSERT with token_id, workspace_id, creator_user_id, label, secret_hash, expires_at, created_at, revoked_at=null; detect UNIQUE constraint on token_id and return ErrTokenIDConflict; propagate other errors as-is

Implement ListWorkspaceTokens(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, workspaceID string) ([]TokenListItem, error): SELECT token_id, label, created_at, expires_at, revoked_at WHERE workspace_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC; never select secret_hash

Implement RevokeWorkspaceToken(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, workspaceID, tokenID string) error: UPDATE workspace_tokens SET revoked_at = ? WHERE token_id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND revoked_at IS NULL; if 0 rows affected and token exists in workspace → treat as already revoked (return nil for idempotency); if token does not exist in workspace → return ErrNotFound

Write unit tests: insert + list roundtrip; token_id collision → ErrTokenIDConflict; revoke active token; revoke already-revoked is idempotent (nil error); revoke non-existent → ErrNotFound; secret_hash never appears in list results

subtasks.title: Verify database layer unit tests pass

checks: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 (or equivalent DB layer package) passes all repository unit tests
go vet ./... reports no issues
InsertWorkspace returns ErrSlugConflict on UNIQUE violation and propagates other errors
GetWorkspaceBySlug returns ErrNotFound for missing slug and correct Workspace for existing slug
ListWorkspaces returns results ordered by created_at ASC, id ASC with owner filter applied correctly
InsertWorkspaceToken returns ErrTokenIDConflict on token_id UNIQUE violation
ListWorkspaceTokens never returns secret_hash; ordering correct
RevokeWorkspaceToken is idempotent for already-revoked tokens; returns ErrNotFound for non-existent/cross-workspace tokens
04-REQ-8.3 (updated_at == created_at on insert) verified by DB-level query in unit test

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/v1/workspaces handler
details: Register route on Echo router: e.POST("/api/v1/workspaces", handler)
Implement handler: use c.Bind() to parse JSON body (unknown fields silently ignored per Echo default); extract auth identity from request context; return 403 if caller is admin or workspace token
Validate slug (validateSlug), git_url (validateGitURL), branch (validateBranch); return 400 with error envelope on any failure
If team_id non-null, call ValidateTeamExists; return 400 if ErrTeamNotFound
Call InsertWorkspace with owner_user_id = authenticated user ID, updated_at = created_at; on ErrSlugConflict return 409; on other DB error return 500
Return HTTP 201 with c.JSON(201, workspace)

subtasks.title: Implement GET /api/v1/workspaces handler
details: Register route: e.GET("/api/v1/workspaces", handler)
Extract auth identity from context; return 403 if caller is a workspace token
If admin: call ListWorkspaces(ctx, db, nil); if user API key: call ListWorkspaces(ctx, db, &userID)
Return HTTP 200 with c.JSON(200, workspaces) — bare array; return empty array [] (not null) when no results

subtasks.title: Implement GET /api/v1/workspaces/:slug handler
details: Register route: e.GET("/api/v1/workspaces/:slug", handler)
Call GetWorkspaceBySlug; return 404 with error envelope if ErrNotFound (for all caller types — no distinction)
Extract auth identity from context; determine caller type (admin, user API key, workspace token)
For user API key: if workspace.OwnerUserID != callerUserID → return 403
For workspace token: compare context workspace_id against workspace.ID → mismatch returns 403; match returns 200
For admin: return 200 directly
Return HTTP 200 with c.JSON(200, workspace) — same schema for all authorized callers, no field redaction

subtasks.title: Verify workspace handler integration tests pass

checks: go test ./internal/integration/... -count=1 -run TestSpec04 -v passes TS-04-1 through TS-04-29 and TS-04-55, TS-04-56, TS-04-E1 through TS-04-E7, TS-04-E11
go vet ./... reports no issues
POST /api/v1/workspaces returns 201 with all eight schema fields; owner_user_id matches auth user; updated_at == created_at
Duplicate slug returns 409; invalid slug/git_url/branch returns 400; invalid team_id returns 400
Admin token on POST returns 403; workspace token on POST returns 403
GET /api/v1/workspaces returns only own workspaces for user, all for admin, 403 for workspace token
GET /api/v1/workspaces/:slug returns 200 for owner/admin/scoped-token; 404 for missing slug (all callers); 403 for non-owner; 403 for mismatched workspace token

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/v1/workspaces/:slug/tokens handler
details: Register route: e.POST("/api/v1/workspaces/:slug/tokens", handler)
Extract auth identity; return 403 if workspace token or non-owner user API key; admin and owner are permitted
Resolve workspace by slug via GetWorkspaceBySlug; return 404 if ErrNotFound
Verify caller is owner or admin (for user API key: workspace.OwnerUserID == callerUserID)
Parse body with c.Bind(); normalizeLabel; validateExpires; return 400 on validation failure
Retry loop (max 3 attempts): call generateTokenID(); call InsertWorkspaceToken(); on ErrTokenIDConflict retry; on 3 failures return 500; on other DB error return 500
Compute expires_at via computeExpiresAt; assemble plaintext token via assembleToken; return HTTP 201 with c.JSON(201, TokenCreateResponse)

subtasks.title: Implement GET /api/v1/workspaces/:slug/tokens handler
details: Register route: e.GET("/api/v1/workspaces/:slug/tokens", handler)
Extract auth identity; return 403 if workspace token caller
Resolve workspace by slug; return 404 if ErrNotFound
Verify caller is owner or admin; return 403 if non-owner user API key
Call ListWorkspaceTokens(ctx, db, workspace.ID); return HTTP 200 with c.JSON(200, tokens) — bare array; empty slice → [] in JSON

subtasks.title: Implement DELETE /api/v1/workspaces/:slug/tokens/:token_id handler
details: Register route: e.DELETE("/api/v1/workspaces/:slug/tokens/:token_id", handler)
Extract auth identity; return 403 if workspace token or non-owner user API key
Resolve workspace by slug; return 404 if ErrNotFound (slug not found)
Verify caller is owner or admin
Call RevokeWorkspaceToken(ctx, db, workspace.ID, tokenID) where tokenID = c.Param("token_id")
On ErrNotFound (token_id not found in this workspace or belongs to different workspace) return 404 with error envelope
On nil error return c.NoContent(204)
On other DB error return 500

subtasks.title: Verify token handler integration tests pass

checks: go test ./internal/integration/... -count=1 -run TestSpec04 -v passes TS-04-30 through TS-04-48, TS-04-49, TS-04-50, TS-04-E8 through TS-04-E13
go vet ./... reports no issues
POST .../tokens returns 201 with token matching ^af_wt_[0-9A-Za-z]{8}_[0-9A-Za-z]{32}$; DB stores SHA-256 hash not plaintext
expires=0 produces null expires_at; omitted expires defaults to created_at + 30 days; invalid expires returns 400
Label normalization: empty string → null in response and DB; >128 chars → 400
Non-owner and workspace-token callers return 403 on POST and GET .../tokens
GET .../tokens lists all tokens (active + expired + revoked) in created_at ASC, id ASC order; no secret field present
DELETE returns 204 for active and already-revoked tokens (idempotent); 404 for missing or cross-workspace token_id; 403 for unauthorized caller
DB error paths return 500 with error envelope and no partial records

task_groups.title: Wiring verification: end-to-end integration and stub audit

subtasks.title: Trace execution paths and verify no stubs remain in handler chain
details: 04-PATH-1 (Create workspace): confirm POST /api/v1/workspaces handler calls validateSlug → validateGitURL → validateBranch → ValidateTeamExists (if team_id) → InsertWorkspace → c.JSON(201, workspace); no panic("not implemented") or // TODO stubs in any called function

04-PATH-2 (Create token): confirm POST .../tokens handler calls GetWorkspaceBySlug → normalizeLabel → validateExpires → generateTokenID (with retry loop ≤3) → generateSecret → hashSecret → InsertWorkspaceToken → assembleToken → c.JSON(201, response); all functions fully implemented

04-PATH-3 (Read via workspace token): confirm GET /:slug handler reads workspace_id from context (set by spec 01 middleware) → GetWorkspaceBySlug → workspace_id comparison → c.JSON(200, workspace); no stub returns
04-PATH-4 (Revoke token): confirm DELETE .../tokens/:token_id handler calls GetWorkspaceBySlug → RevokeWorkspaceToken → c.NoContent(204); idempotency handled at DB layer
04-PATH-5 (Admin list): confirm GET /api/v1/workspaces handler calls ListWorkspaces(nil) for admin → c.JSON(200, workspaces); no stub

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation across the handler stack
details: Confirm InsertWorkspace error return is checked and translated to 409 (ErrSlugConflict) or 500 (other); not swallowed
Confirm GetWorkspaceBySlug error return is checked and translated to 404 (ErrNotFound) or 500; not swallowed
Confirm RevokeWorkspaceToken error return is checked and translated to 404 (ErrNotFound) or 500; idempotent nil for already-revoked
Confirm generateBase62 error (from crypto/rand) propagates out of generateTokenID/generateSecret and is returned as HTTP 500 — not silenced
Confirm hashSecret return value is used as the stored secret_hash (not the plaintext); verify by reading DB in smoke test TS-04-SMOKE-2
Confirm assembleToken return value is placed in the 'token' field of the creation response and the secret component is not stored to DB

subtasks.title: Run all smoke tests with real components and verify effects
details: TS-04-SMOKE-1: POST /api/v1/workspaces with real Echo + real SQLite → HTTP 201; query DB to confirm workspace row exists with updated_at == created_at
TS-04-SMOKE-2: POST .../tokens with real crypto/rand → HTTP 201; token matches regex; query DB to confirm secret_hash == hex(sha256(secret)); plaintext not in any DB column
TS-04-SMOKE-3: GET /:slug with real workspace token → HTTP 200 with all eight fields; using token for different slug → HTTP 403; using expired/revoked token → HTTP 401
TS-04-SMOKE-4: DELETE .../tokens/:token_id → HTTP 204; second DELETE → HTTP 204; query DB to confirm revoked_at non-null; cross-workspace token_id → 404
TS-04-SMOKE-5: GET /api/v1/workspaces with admin token → HTTP 200 with all workspaces from all users ordered correctly; workspace token on same endpoint → 403

subtasks.title: Perform stub and dead-code audit across all spec 04 implementation files
details: Search all .go files in spec 04 packages for panic("not implemented"), bare 'return nil' in non-trivial paths, // TODO, // FIXME markers
Confirm no handler function returns a hardcoded status or empty response as a placeholder
Confirm generateBase62, hashSecret, InsertWorkspace, InsertWorkspaceToken, RevokeWorkspaceToken have complete implementations (not just stub signatures)
Confirm the token_id collision retry loop is a real loop with counter ≤3 (not a single attempt with a comment saying 'TODO: add retries')
Confirm error envelope format {"error":{"code":<int>,"message":"<string>"}} is used consistently by all error return paths — not just some handlers

subtasks.title: Verify cross-spec entry points are called from production code
details: Confirm the spec 01 auth middleware is registered on the Echo router group that includes all six spec 04 routes — not just test code
Confirm the middleware attaches workspace_id to context for 'af_wt_' prefixed tokens; verify GET /:slug handler reads this value from context using the key defined by spec 01
Confirm the spec 02 user identity (user ID) is available in request context and is correctly read by POST /api/v1/workspaces to set owner_user_id
Confirm that blocked-user check (04-REQ-12.4) is performed by spec 01 middleware, not re-implemented in spec 04 handlers
If any cross-spec entry point is missing or uses a stub, raise a blocking issue referencing the relevant spec

subtasks.title: Final wiring verification: all tests pass, no stubs, full end-to-end confirmed

checks: go test ./... -count=1 passes with 0 failures — all spec 04 tests and no regressions in specs 01 and 02
go vet ./... reports 0 issues across all packages
grep -r 'panic("not implemented")\|// TODO\|// FIXME' internal/ returns no results in spec 04 implementation files
All five execution paths (04-PATH-1 through 04-PATH-5) traced end-to-end with no gaps between function calls
TS-04-SMOKE-1 through TS-04-SMOKE-5 all pass with real Echo server, real SQLite DB, and real crypto/rand
DB-level assertions in TS-04-31, TS-04-50 confirm SHA-256 hash stored and plaintext not present in any workspace_tokens column
Cross-spec middleware integration confirmed: 'af_wt_' tokens resolved to workspace_id by spec 01 middleware and correctly consumed by spec 04 GET /:slug handler
Spec 02 user identity correctly propagated to owner_user_id in workspace creation — verified by TS-04-15 assertion on owner_user_id field
